---
title: "Creacion modelo"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-25"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Cargamos las librerías que vamos a utilizar

```{r}
library(urca)
library(tseries)
library(readr)
library(lmtest)
library(car)
```


```{r}
datos <- read_csv("base_smi.csv")
```
